examples: Amidst the current bunch of nonentities, he is a towering figure.
Japanese have less to sing about amidst sustained economic problems.
Young lovers walked arm in arm amidst flowers of every color of the rainbow.
Amidst such success, it is impossible to say how much more success could be achieved.
Amidst dozens of openings, each recruiter might have time for only a handful of exploratory meetings.
